query:
-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B004 (base + $15)
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3, effectiveDate)
SELECT id, 150.00, 165.00, 180.00, CURDATE()
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B004';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B003 (base + $12)
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3, effectiveDate)
SELECT id, 140.00, 152.00, 164.00, CURDATE()
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B003';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B002 (base + $18)
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3, effectiveDate)
SELECT id, 155.00, 173.00, 191.00, CURDATE()
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B002';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B001 (base + $10)
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3, effectiveDate)
SELECT id, 145.00, 155.00, 165.00, CURDATE()
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B001';
